title: Running Area
description: A motion wrapper that continuously scrolls its children in a loop (e.g. right-to-left), restarting from the beginning once it reaches the end.
summary: A looping motion container for creating continuous scrolling effects like marquees.

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly see how the `RunningArea` works.

<RunningAreaDemosUsage />

## Properties

Interactive configurator to explore customization options for the `RunningArea` component.

<RunningAreaDemosConfigurator />

## API References

### Styles API

| Styles API    | Type                                              | Default     | Annotation                             |
| ------------- | ------------------------------------------------- | ----------- | -------------------------------------- |
| classNames`?` | `{ wrap?: string; inner?: string }`               | `undefined` | `classNames={{ wrap: "", inner: "" }}` |
| styles`?`     | `{ wrap?: CSSProperties; inner?: CSSProperties }` | `undefined` | `styles={{ wrap: {}, inner: {} }}`     |

### Props API

| Props API    | Type                | Default                    | Annotation                           |
| ------------ | ------------------- | -------------------------- | ------------------------------------ |
| el`?`        | `React.ElementType` | `wrap:"div"` `inner:"div"` | `el={{ wrap: "div", inner: "div" }}` |
| direction`?` | `(string & {})`     | `"right-to-left"`          | set running direction types          |
| duration`?`  | `number`            | `25`                       | set running duration speed           |

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup and styles.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.

<SourceCodes name="running-area" />

`,(0,n.jsx)(o,{name:"running-area",code:`"use client";\r
import * as React from "react";\r
import { cn } from "@/utils/cn";\r
import { mergeRefs } from "@/hooks/use-merged-ref";\r
\r
type __Selector = "container" | "content";\r
type CSSProperties = React.CSSProperties & { [key: string]: any };\r
type NestedRecord<U extends [string, unknown], T extends string> = {\r
  [K in U as K[0]]?: Partial<Record<T, K[1]>>;\r
};\r
type U = ["el", React.ElementType] | ["styles", CSSProperties] | ["classNames", string];\r
\r
type UseRunningArea = {\r
  direction?: "right-to-left" | "left-to-right" | "top-to-bottom" | "bottom-to-top";\r
  duration?: number;\r
};\r
\r
export function useRunningArea({ duration = 25, direction }: UseRunningArea) {\r
  const containerRef = React.useRef<HTMLElement>(null);\r
  const contentRef = React.useRef<HTMLElement>(null);\r
  const animationFrameId = React.useRef<number | null>(null);\r
  const currentPosition = React.useRef<number>(0);\r
  const lastTimeRef = React.useRef<number>(0);\r
\r
  React.useEffect(() => {\r
    const container = containerRef.current;\r
    const content = contentRef.current;\r
\r
    if (!container || !content) return;\r
\r
    const containerWidth = container.offsetWidth;\r
    const contentWidth = content.offsetWidth;\r
    const containerHeight = container.offsetHeight;\r
    const contentHeight = content.offsetHeight;\r
\r
    if ((direction === "right-to-left" || direction === "left-to-right") && containerWidth >= contentWidth) return;\r
    if ((direction === "bottom-to-top" || direction === "top-to-bottom") && containerHeight >= contentHeight) return;\r
\r
    let isDragging = false;\r
    let initialX = 0;\r
    let deltaX = 0;\r
\r
    const handleStart = (clientX: number) => {\r
      isDragging = true;\r
      initialX = clientX;\r
      deltaX = 0;\r
      if (animationFrameId.current !== null) {\r
        cancelAnimationFrame(animationFrameId.current);\r
      }\r
    };\r
\r
    const handleMove = (clientX: number) => {\r
      if (!isDragging) return;\r
      deltaX = clientX - initialX;\r
      const newPosition = currentPosition.current + deltaX;\r
      content.style.transform = \`translateX(\${newPosition}px)\`;\r
    };\r
\r
    const handleEnd = () => {\r
      isDragging = false;\r
      currentPosition.current += deltaX;\r
      requestAnimationFrame(animate);\r
    };\r
\r
    const handleTouchStart = (e: TouchEvent) => handleStart(e.touches[0].clientX);\r
    const handleTouchMove = (e: TouchEvent) => handleMove(e.touches[0].clientX);\r
    const handleMouseDown = (e: MouseEvent) => handleStart(e.clientX);\r
    const handleMouseMove = (e: MouseEvent) => handleMove(e.clientX);\r
\r
    const animate = (timestamp: number) => {\r
      if (!lastTimeRef.current) {\r
        lastTimeRef.current = timestamp;\r
      }\r
\r
      const elapsed = timestamp - lastTimeRef.current;\r
\r
      if (elapsed >= duration) {\r
        lastTimeRef.current = timestamp - (elapsed % duration);\r
\r
        if (!isDragging) {\r
          if (direction === "right-to-left") {\r
            currentPosition.current -= Math.floor(elapsed / duration);\r
            if (currentPosition.current <= -contentWidth) {\r
              currentPosition.current = containerWidth;\r
            }\r
          }\r
          if (direction === "bottom-to-top") {\r
            currentPosition.current -= Math.floor(elapsed / duration);\r
            if (currentPosition.current <= -contentHeight) {\r
              currentPosition.current = containerHeight;\r
            }\r
          }\r
          if (direction === "left-to-right") {\r
            currentPosition.current += Math.floor(elapsed / duration);\r
            if (currentPosition.current >= containerWidth) {\r
              currentPosition.current = -contentWidth;\r
            }\r
          }\r
          if (direction === "top-to-bottom") {\r
            currentPosition.current += Math.floor(elapsed / duration);\r
            if (currentPosition.current >= containerHeight) {\r
              currentPosition.current = -contentHeight;\r
            }\r
          }\r
\r
          if (direction === "top-to-bottom" || direction === "bottom-to-top") {\r
            content.style.transform = \`translateY(\${currentPosition.current}px)\`;\r
          } else {\r
            content.style.transform = \`translateX(\${currentPosition.current}px)\`;\r
          }\r
        }\r
      }\r
\r
      animationFrameId.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate);\r
    };\r
\r
    content.addEventListener("touchstart", handleTouchStart);\r
    content.addEventListener("touchmove", handleTouchMove);\r
    content.addEventListener("touchend", handleEnd);\r
    content.addEventListener("mousedown", handleMouseDown);\r
    content.addEventListener("mousemove", handleMouseMove);\r
    content.addEventListener("mouseup", handleEnd);\r
\r
    document.addEventListener("mouseup", () => {\r
      isDragging = false;\r
    });\r
    animationFrameId.current = requestAnimationFrame(animate);\r
\r
    return () => {\r
      content.removeEventListener("touchstart", handleTouchStart);\r
      content.removeEventListener("touchmove", handleTouchMove);\r
      content.removeEventListener("touchend", handleEnd);\r
      content.removeEventListener("mousedown", handleMouseDown);\r
      content.removeEventListener("mousemove", handleMouseMove);\r
      content.removeEventListener("mouseup", handleEnd);\r
\r
      document.removeEventListener("mouseup", () => {\r
        isDragging = false;\r
      });\r
      if (animationFrameId.current) {\r
        cancelAnimationFrame(animationFrameId.current);\r
      }\r
    };\r
  }, [duration, direction]);\r
\r
  return { containerRef, contentRef };\r
}\r
\r
type Options = UseRunningArea & {\r
  className?: string;\r
  style?: CSSProperties;\r
  classNames?: Partial<Record<__Selector, string>>;\r
  styles?: Partial<Record<__Selector, CSSProperties>>;\r
};\r
function getStyles(selector: __Selector, opts: Options) {\r
  const container = selector === "container";\r
  const content = selector === "content";\r
  const runningY = opts.direction === "bottom-to-top" || opts.direction === "top-to-bottom";\r
  const running = runningY ? "y" : "x";\r
  return {\r
    "data-direction": container ? opts.direction : undefined,\r
    "data-running": running,\r
    className: cn(opts.classNames?.[selector], opts.className, container && ["group overflow-hidden"], content && ["min-w-max min-h-max whitespace-nowrap select-none flex items-center justify-center", runningY ? "flex-col" : "flex-row"]),\r
    style: { ...opts?.styles?.[selector], ...opts?.style }\r
  };\r
}\r
\r
export interface RunningAreaProps extends Options, NestedRecord<U, __Selector>, Omit<React.DetailedHTMLProps<React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLElement>, HTMLElement>, "style"> {\r
  style?: CSSProperties;\r
}\r
\r
export const RunningArea = React.forwardRef<HTMLElement, RunningAreaProps>((_props, ref) => {\r
  const { el = { container: "div", content: "div" }, direction = "right-to-left", duration = 25, children, className, style, classNames, styles, ...rest } = _props;\r
  const refs = useRunningArea({ direction, duration });\r
  const Container = el.container as React.ElementType;\r
  const Content = el.content as React.ElementType;\r
  const stylesApi = { classNames, styles, direction };\r
  return (\r
    <Container\r
      {...{\r
        ref: mergeRefs(refs.containerRef, ref),\r
        "data-animation": "RunningArea",\r
        ...getStyles("container", { className, style, ...stylesApi }),\r
        ...rest\r
      }}\r
    >\r
      <Content {...{ ref: refs.contentRef, ...getStyles("content", stylesApi) }}>{children}</Content>\r
    </Container>\r
  );\r
});\r
RunningArea.displayName = "RunningArea";`,ext:".tsx",repo:"web/components/running-area.tsx"})]})}function u(t={}){let{wrapper:e}=t.components||{};return e?(0,n.jsx)(e,{...t,children:(0,n.jsx)(h,{...t})}):h(t)}function s(t,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+t+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return x(b);})();
